title: Адаптация на пазара  Прогнозиране на следващия голям ход
author: TradeTravelChill
summary_bullets: But not always what you expect happens, that's why you have to adapt very quickly to the market.
Drop level 1, drop level 2, and throughout the whole time, even after dropping below 100,000, we were talking about this potential target, which was a one-year heatmap of about 70,000.
Because while the people were digging the mountains, we were already preparing for what was going on.
